turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. I was just wondering, kya aapke yahan interpreter available hai? Meri naani ko Marathi mein samjhana padta hai doctors ko.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ji zaroor. Humare zyaadatar doctors aur nursing staff Marathi mein baat kar sakte hain. Aap appointment ke time mention kar dena, hum ensure karenge ki Marathi-speaking staff ho naani ji ke saath.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Bahut acha. Aur agar koi Hindi bolne wala chahiye toh?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hindi bhi koi problem nahi. Hum Marathi, Hindi aur English mein comfortable hain. Patients ki comfort hamare liye priority hai.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Bahut acha clinic lagta hai aapka. Shukriya.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Aapka swagat hai. Kab bhi zaroorat ho, humse milne aana!
